formalized_text: The system shall display all client profiles in a centralized list view that supports searching and filtering.
original_text: REQ-FUN-001: All client profiles shall be listed in a central, searchable, and filterable view.
validation_criteria: ['The client list view must display key information such as Company Name, Primary Contact, and Status.', 'A search bar must allow users to find clients by Company Name.', 'A filter control must allow users to filter the list by Status (e.g., Active, Inactive).', 'The list view must support pagination for large numbers of clients.']

formalized_text: The system shall allow 'Areas of Expertise / Skills' to be added to vendor profiles using a tag-based input field.
original_text: REQ-FUN-001: Vendor profiles shall include a multi-select or tag-based field for 'Areas of Expertise / Skills' which shall be searchable.
validation_criteria: ['The vendor profile form includes a field for adding multiple skill tags.', 'Users can select from a predefined list of skills or add new ones.', 'The entered skills are stored and associated with the vendor profile.', 'The vendor search functionality can query against these skill tags.']

formalized_text: The system shall provide a secure interface for authenticated Vendor Contacts to update their own company's profile information.
original_text: REQ-FUN-001: Vendors shall be able to manage their own profiles, including contact information and skill tags, after onboarding.
validation_criteria: ['A logged-in Vendor Contact can access a profile management page.', "The Vendor Contact can edit their company's contact information and payment details.", "The Vendor Contact can add or remove skill tags from their company's profile.", 'Changes made by the vendor are logged in the audit trail.']

formalized_text: The system shall process uploaded SOW documents asynchronously to avoid blocking the user interface.
original_text: REQ-FUN-002: The system shall process the uploaded SOW asynchronously, and the SOW status shall be marked as `PROCESSING`.
validation_criteria: ["Immediately after a successful upload, the SOW's status in the UI is displayed as 'PROCESSING'.", 'The SOW processing task is added to a background job queue.', 'The user can navigate away from the page without interrupting the processing.', "The system must handle processing failures gracefully and update the SOW status to 'Failed'."]

formalized_text: The system shall provide a 'human-in-the-loop' interface for System Administrators to review, edit, and approve the AI-extracted SOW data.
original_text: REQ-FUN-002: These extracted data points shall be presented to the Admin for review, editing, and approval in a 'human-in-the-loop' interface to form a standardized 'Project Brief'.
validation_criteria: ['After AI processing, the system presents the extracted data in an editable form.', 'The Admin can modify any of the extracted fields (e.g., add/remove skills, edit scope summary).', "The Admin must explicitly approve the data to finalize it as the 'Project Brief'.", 'Once approved, the Project Brief becomes read-only and is used for vendor matching.']

formalized_text: The system shall perform a semantic search to identify and rank vendors whose skills match the requirements of the approved Project Brief.
original_text: REQ-FUN-002: ...the system shall generate vector embeddings and perform a semantic search against the vendor database...to recommend a ranked list of suitable vendors...
assumptions: ['Vendor profiles have been populated with skill tags and converted to vector embeddings.']
validation_criteria: ['The system generates vector embeddings from the skills listed in the Project Brief.', 'A semantic search is performed against the vector embeddings of vendor skills in the database.', 'The system returns a list of vendors ranked by their similarity score to the project requirements.', 'The ranked list of recommended vendors is displayed to the System Administrator.']

formalized_text: The system shall provide an anonymous Q&A feature within the proposal submission portal.
original_text: REQ-FUN-003: The portal shall also include a Q&A feature where vendors can submit questions anonymously; answers provided by the Admin shall be visible to all vendors invited to that project.
validation_criteria: ['Vendors can submit questions through a form on the portal; their identity is not displayed with the question.', 'System Administrators receive a notification for each new question.', "An Admin's answer to a question is displayed publicly on the portal for all invited vendors to see.", 'The Q&A section is closed after the proposal deadline.']

formalized_text: The system shall provide a proposal management dashboard for System Administrators to review and compare all submitted proposals for a project.
original_text: REQ-FUN-003: The Admin shall have a dashboard to view, compare side-by-side, and manage all proposals received for a project.
validation_criteria: ['The dashboard lists all vendors who have submitted a proposal, along with key data points (Cost, Timeline).', 'The system provides a side-by-side comparison view for two or more selected proposals.', 'The comparison view highlights differences in key data points.', "Admins can change the status of each proposal directly from this dashboard (e.g., to 'Shortlisted', 'Rejected')."]

formalized_text: The system shall provide a main dashboard for System Administrators that displays a high-level, real-time overview of business operations.
original_text: REQ-FUN-005: The Admin's main dashboard shall provide a high-level overview of the business...
validation_criteria: ['The dashboard must include a widget showing the count of projects in key statuses (e.g., Active, Proposed).', 'The dashboard must include a widget for pending actions, such as SOWs to review or proposals awaiting decision.', 'The dashboard must display key financial metrics (e.g., total revenue, net profit) for the current month.', 'The dashboard must list upcoming key project milestones.']

formalized_text: The system shall send notifications to users via multiple channels (in-app, email, webhook) for key system and project events.
original_text: REQ-FUN-005: The system shall send in-app and email notifications to users for key events.
validation_criteria: ["Notifications are triggered for events like 'New Proposal Submitted', 'Payment Completed', and 'Proposal Status Changed'.", 'Internal users (Admins, Finance) receive in-app notifications.', 'External users (Clients, Vendors) receive email notifications.', 'The system supports sending notifications to a configurable webhook URL for integration with tools like Slack.']

formalized_text: The system shall generate a Project Profitability Report.
original_text: REQ-REP-001: The system shall provide a Project Profitability Report...
validation_criteria: ['The report details the invoice amount, vendor payout, and net profit for each completed project.', 'The report can be filtered by a date range.', 'The report can be filtered by client.', 'The report data can be exported to a CSV file.']

req_id: REQ-NFR-009: The system shall provide a secure, dedicated admin UI for the initial bulk import of existing Client and Vendor data from a CSV format.
formalized_text: The system shall provide a CSV import tool for System Administrators to bulk-upload Client and Vendor data.
original_text: FALSE
validation_criteria: ['The tool provides separate import functions for Client and Vendor data.', 'The UI allows the Admin to download a CSV template with the required headers.', "The import tool includes a 'dry run' option to validate the CSV file without committing data.", 'After an import attempt, the system provides a detailed report of successful rows, warnings, and failures with specific error messages.']

formalized_text: The system shall allow System Administrators to configure default margin/fee structures and override them on a per-project basis.
original_text: REQ-FUN-004: The system shall provide a configuration module where System Administrators can set default margin/fee structures...
validation_criteria: ['A settings page allows Admins to define default margins (e.g., a percentage or a fixed fee).', 'When creating a project invoice, the default margin is applied automatically.', 'The Admin has the option to input a custom margin value for a specific project, which overrides the default.', 'Any override of a margin must be logged in the audit trail with the user who performed the action.']

formalized_text: The system shall allow payout rules to be defined for each project.
original_text: REQ-FUN-004: Payout rules (e.g., percentage on completion or milestone) shall be defined at the project level.
validation_criteria: ['During project setup, an Admin can define the payout structure (e.g., 100% on completion, 50/50 on milestones).', 'The system uses these rules to determine when to trigger payout workflows.', "The defined rules are visible on the project's financial summary page."]

formalized_text: The system's user interface shall be implemented using the Radix UI component library and styled with Tailwind CSS to achieve a specified modern, minimalist aesthetic.
original_text: REQ-INT-001: The User Interface (UI) shall be clean, modern, intuitive, and adhere to a '2040' futuristic aesthetic.
assumptions: ['A detailed design system or style guide will be provided.']
validation_criteria: ['All UI components must be built using Radix UI primitives.', 'All styling must be implemented using Tailwind CSS utility classes.', "The final UI must be approved by the project stakeholder as matching the '2040' design concept.", 'The UI must provide both a light and a dark theme, which the user can toggle.']

formalized_text: The system's web application shall be fully responsive, providing a functional and usable experience on desktop, tablet, and mobile screen sizes.
original_text: REQ-INT-001: The application shall be fully responsive and functional across all modern desktop, tablet, and mobile web browsers.
validation_criteria: ['All pages and features are usable on a screen width of 360px.', 'Layouts adapt cleanly across common breakpoints for mobile, tablet, and desktop.', 'There is no horizontal scrolling on any page at any standard screen size.', 'The application functions correctly on the latest two major versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge.']

formalized_text: The system's user interface must comply with Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 at the AA conformance level.
original_text: REQ-INT-001: The UI shall adhere to Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA standards.
validation_criteria: ['All interactive elements can be operated via keyboard only.', 'All images and non-text content have appropriate text alternatives.', 'Color contrast ratios for text and UI components meet or exceed WCAG AA requirements.', 'The application is navigable and usable with common screen reader software (e.g., NVDA, VoiceOver).']

formalized_text: The system shall use the AWS Simple Email Service (SES) API for sending all outbound transactional emails.
original_text: REQ-INT-002: The system shall use the AWS Simple Email Service (SES) API to send all transactional emails and notifications.
validation_criteria: ['The system is configured to send email via SES.', 'All user-facing emails (invitations, notifications, invoices) are sent through this service.', 'The system handles email bounce and complaint notifications from SES to maintain sender reputation.', 'Email templates are managed within the application and rendered with dynamic content before sending.']

formalized_text: The system shall ensure that the 95th percentile response time for all interactive API endpoints is less than 250 milliseconds under nominal load.
original_text: REQ-NFR-001: The 95th percentile (p95) for all interactive API calls shall be less than 250ms.
validation_criteria: ['Performance load tests are executed as part of the CI/CD pipeline.', 'Monitoring tools (e.g., Prometheus, CloudWatch) are configured to track and alert on the p95 latency of API endpoints.', 'The nominal load is defined as 1,000 concurrent users executing typical workflows.', 'Any API endpoint exceeding this threshold must be flagged for optimization.']

formalized_text: The system shall achieve a Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) of less than 2.5 seconds for all key user-facing pages.
original_text: REQ-NFR-001: The Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) for key pages (Dashboard, Project Workspace) shall be under 2.5 seconds.
validation_criteria: ['Key pages are defined as the Main Dashboard, Client Management View, Vendor Management View, and Project Workspace.', 'Frontend performance is measured using tools like Lighthouse or Playwright performance tracing.', "This metric is tested on a simulated average network connection (e.g., 'Fast 3G').", 'Code splitting, asset optimization, and caching strategies are implemented to meet this target.']

formalized_text: The system shall be designed and deployed to achieve a service availability of 99.9% or higher.
original_text: REQ-NFR-004: The system shall have a target uptime of 99.9%, excluding planned maintenance.
validation_criteria: ['This availability target translates to no more than 8.77 hours of unplanned downtime per year.', 'System availability is monitored using a combination of AWS CloudWatch alarms and external uptime monitoring services.', 'The architecture leverages multiple AWS Availability Zones for all critical components to mitigate single-zone failures.', 'Planned maintenance windows are scheduled during off-peak hours and communicated to users at least 48 hours in advance.']

formalized_text: The system must have a documented and regularly tested disaster recovery (DR) plan.
original_text: REQ-NFR-002: A documented disaster recovery plan shall be created and tested quarterly to restore service from backups in a secondary region.
assumptions: ['Automated database backups and point-in-time recovery are enabled.']
validation_criteria: ['The DR plan details the procedures to restore service in a secondary AWS region.', 'The plan must meet a Recovery Time Objective (RTO) of 4 hours.', 'The plan must meet a Recovery Point Objective (RPO) of 15 minutes.', 'DR drills are executed quarterly to validate the plan and procedures.']

formalized_text: The system's containerized services shall be configured to scale horizontally automatically based on resource utilization.
original_text: REQ-NFR-005: The microservices architecture running on Kubernetes (EKS) shall be configured to automatically scale pods horizontally based on CPU and memory load...
validation_criteria: ['Each microservice deployment in EKS has a Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) configured.', 'HPAs are configured to scale pods based on CPU and/or memory utilization targets (e.g., scale up if CPU exceeds 75%).', 'The EKS cluster itself is configured with a Cluster Autoscaler to add or remove worker nodes as needed.', 'Load tests verify that the system correctly scales out under increased load and scales in as load decreases.']
